# Description

# [PKT-PRV-002](task-0069): Health Checks

## Purpose

Implement provider health checks.

## Scope

- Health check logic
- Status reporting
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Implement checks
2. Add status reporting
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Checks work
2. Status reported
3. Alerts sent
